prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical modern football superstar collectible poster for 埃尔林·哈兰德, showing an ultra-realistic striker charging toward the camera in a dramatic stadium action scene, with a futuristic sports-data archive interface around him.

Canvas: Tall portrait poster, about 9:16 ratio. Dark blue, icy steel, and gold color palette. High contrast cinematic lighting, rain mist, flying turf, dust, sparks, motion blur, and a packed stadium roof in the background.

Main subject: A powerful blond male footballer in a sky-blue jersey, white shorts, and pale blue socks, sprinting and kicking forward from the center of the poster. Use an extreme low-angle perspective: his boot and the football are closest to the viewer, large and motion-blurred in the foreground, while his torso fills the center. The face should be covered by a centered square blurred censor block, while hair, body, uniform, and pose remain visible. Emphasize muscular arms, explosive forward momentum, and a “finishing machine” striker vibe.

Top typography: Huge distressed white Chinese headline text reading 埃尔林·哈兰德. Beneath it, a smaller gold subtitle with separators reading 北欧巨炮 · 终结机器 · 禁区统治者. Add thin gold horizontal accent lines on both sides.

Data interface layout: Place exactly 8 transparent HUD-style stat cards around the player, with thin gold and pale-blue technical borders, tiny charts, icons, microtext, and graphs. Left column has exactly 4 cards from top to bottom: 1) 「青训起点」 with a small player path diagram, 2) 「萨尔茨堡爆发」 with a kicking silhouette and growth chart, 3) 「多特锋芒」 with a running player icon and graph, 4) 「曼城时期」 with a stadium icon and bar chart. Right column has exactly 4 cards from top to bottom: 1) 「进球效率」 with a target icon and bar chart, 2) 「禁区统治力」 with a goal icon and rising line graph, 3) 「冲刺与力量」 with a sprinting icon and bar chart, 4) 「纪录刷新者」 with a trophy icon and data chart.

Bottom timeline: Add a thin career timeline stretching across the lower poster with exactly 6 small footballer silhouette milestones and tiny year labels, connected by gold dots and a fine line. Include faint blue equalizer-style bars behind the timeline.

Bottom title plate: At the very bottom, add a dark futuristic nameplate with gold trim, chevron arrows on both sides, and large gold Chinese text reading 新生代巨星破框档案.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic sports photography mixed with sci-fi infographic design, collectible World Cup poster energy, volumetric stadium light beams, sharp typography, gritty texture, layered depth, premium editorial composition.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and in Chinese where specified. Use exactly 8 side stat cards and exactly 6 bottom timeline milestones. Do not add logos, club badges, brand marks, watermarks, or extra people. The central player must dominate the composition, with the ball breaking toward the viewer in the lower right foreground.
